race.comment: IL MERLINO (3) was in a different class last time with a dominant 2.5 lengths win over 1000m at this track, making it two wins in a row. Rates well and looks tough to beat again. AMPAWAN (7) was far from disgraced when third last start over 1000m at this track, beaten 2 lengths. That followed a win at this track the start prior. Looks well placed so expect a better run this time. EL SABLAZO (6) doesn't win out of turn but ran a nice race last time out over 1100m at this track, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths. Has his share of ability. Hard to beat in this suitable race. HERMANA QUERIDA (13) resumes after a break of three-and-a-half months. Did win at her only other first-up run when on debut, scoring over 1200m at this track. Solid top-three hope.
